---
title: "Evaluate GPD parameter estimation methods"
date: "Compiled at `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = 'UTC')` UTC"
output:
  github_document: default
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
always_allow_html: true
params:
  name: "02_unconstrained"
---

```{r here, message=FALSE}
here::i_am(paste0(params$name, ".Rmd"), uuid = "52a6b799-d49a-4efe-9bb8-22bea6c7d463")
```

```{r global-options, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "cairo_pdf"),
  fig.ext = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.width = 10, 
  fig.height = 5, 
  dpi = 200,
  fig.path = paste0('figures/', params, "/sim_GPD_unconstr_"),
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  echo = FALSE)
```

In this document, several existing methods for estimating parameters of the Generalized Pareto Distribution (GPD) are compared and evaluated regarding their estimation accuracy. 

## Install and load packages


```{r packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(conflicted)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(kableExtra)
library(eva)
library(furrr)
library(progressr)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
```

```{r directories}
# create or *empty* the target directory, used to write this file's data: 
#projthis::proj_create_dir_target(params$name, clean = TRUE)

# function to get path to target directory: path_target("sample.csv")
path_target <- projthis::proj_path_target(params$name)

# function to get path to previous data: path_source("00-import", "sample.csv")
path_source <- projthis::proj_path_source(params$name)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load permApprox functions
proj_path <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_file("README.md"))
permApprox_path <- file.path(proj_path, "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/R")
permApprox_functions <- list.files(permApprox_path, pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)
invisible(sapply(permApprox_functions, source))
```

## Setting

### GPD parameters

All possible combinations of the following parameters are considered:

```{r}
shapes <- c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)
scale <- 1
sample_sizes <- c(25, 50, 75, 100, 250, 500, 750, 1000)
num_reps <- 500
cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 2

cat("Shape values: ", shapes,
    "\nScale: ", scale,
    "\nSample sizes: ", sample_sizes,
    "\nRepetitions: ", num_reps)
```

### Fit methods

The GPD parameters are estimated for all considered parameter combinations using the following estimation methods:

* MOM (Method of Moments)
* PWM (Probability weighted momement) by Hosking-Wallis
* LME (Likelihood moment estimator) by Zhang (2007)
* WNLLSM (Weighted Nonlinear Least Squares Likelihood Moments Estimation) by Zhao et al. (2019)
* MLE-1D (one-dimensional MLE) by Castillo & Serra (2015)
* MLE-2D (Maximum Likelihood Estimation)
* NLS2 (Quantile Estimation) by Song & Song (2012)
* ZSE (Zhang Stephens Estimator; Bayesian methods) by Zhang & Stephens (2009)

```{r}
# Methods for parameter fitting
fit_methods <- c("MOM", "PWM", "LME", "MLE1D", "MLE2D", "NLS2", "WNLLSM", "ZSE")
fit_methods <- factor(fit_methods, levels = fit_methods)
```

### Combinations

```{r}
# Create combinations of shape, sample size, and method
estimation_settings <- tidyr::crossing(shape = shapes, 
                                       n = sample_sizes, 
                                       method = fit_methods)

estimation_settings %>% head()

cat("Number of settings: ", nrow(estimation_settings))
```

## Perform estimations

```{r}
# Define estimation function
estimate_one_setting <- function(i, path_results, path_data) {
  setting <- estimation_settings[i, ]
  shape <- unlist(base::unname(setting$shape))
  n <- unlist(base::unname(setting$n))
  method <- as.character(unlist(base::unname(setting$method)))
  
  tol <- case_when(
    method == "LME" ~ 1e-7,
    method == "MLE1D" ~ 1e-10,
    method == "MLE2D" ~ 1e-10,
    method == "NLS2" ~ 1e-9,
    method == "WNLLSM" ~1e-9,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  
  # Output file path
  result_file <- file.path(path_results, 
                           paste0("shape-", shape, 
                                  "_n-", n,
                                  "_method-", method, 
                                  ".RDS"))
  
  #if (!file.exists(result_file)) {
    # Load data
    data_file <- file.path(path_data, 
                           paste0("shape-", shape, "_n-", n, ".RDS"))
    gpd_samples <- readRDS(data_file)
    
    # Estimate parameters
    fit_results <- purrr::imap_dfr(gpd_samples, ~ {
      browser()
      fit <- fit_gpd(
        data = .x, 
        fit_method = method,
        thresh = 0, 
        support_boundary = NULL, 
        constraint = "unconstrained",
        tol = tol, 
        epsilon = 0
      )
      tibble(true_shape = shape,
             n = n,
             method = method,
             repetition = .y,
             parameter = c("shape", "scale"), 
             true_value = c(shape, scale),
             estimate = c(fit$shape, fit$scale))
    })
    
    # Save results
    saveRDS(fit_results,file = result_file)

  #} else {
   # fit_results <- NULL
  #}
  
  return(fit_results)
}
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Set up progress handler
handlers("txtprogressbar")

# Set number of cores
if (parallel::detectCores() < cores) {
  cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 2
}

# Set up parallel plan
plan(multisession, workers = cores)

path_results <- path_target()
path_data <- path_source("01_data_gen")

# Run estimation in parallel with progress
with_progress({
  pb <- progressor(steps = nrow(estimation_settings))

  gpdfitlist <- future_map(seq_len(nrow(estimation_settings)), function(i) {
    pb()
    estimate_one_setting(i, 
                         path_results = path_results, 
                         path_data = path_data)
  })
})

# Optionally stop the plan (not necessary in most cases)
plan(sequential)
```

## Combine results

```{r}
# Load all result files and combine into one data frame
all_result_files <- list.files(path_target(), full.names = TRUE)

gpdfitlist <- purrr::map_dfr(all_result_files, ~ {
  res <- readRDS(.x)
  res %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.list), ~ unlist(base::unname(.))))
}) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = levels(fit_methods))) %>%
  arrange(true_shape)

# Filter
gpdfitlist <- gpdfitlist %>% filter(! method %in% c("PWM"))

# Compute evaluation metrics
evaluation <- gpdfitlist %>%
  group_by(true_shape, n, method, parameter) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
    bias = mean(estimate - true_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse = mean((estimate - true_value)^2, na.rm = TRUE),
    rmse = sqrt(mean((estimate - true_value)^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
str(gpdfitlist)
```

## Boxplots

### Colors

```{r}
# Okabe Ito palette (colorblind-friendly)
okabe_ito_cols <- c("black",   "#E69F00", "#56B4E9", 
                    "#009E73", "#F0E442", "#0072B2",
                    "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "gray60")
  
my_cols_old <- c("gray60", "#A6CEE3", "#B2DF8A", "#33A02C", "#1F78B4",
                   "#FF7F00", "#6A3D9A")

my_cols <- c(
  "MOM"    = "#6C6C6C",
  "PWM"    = "#6C6C6C",
  "LME"    = "#009E73", 
  "MLE1D"  = "#56B4E9", 
  "MLE2D"  = "#0072B2",
  "NLS2"   = "#E69F00",
  "WNLLSM" = "#D55E00",
  "ZSE"    = "#CC79A7"
)
```

### Plot function

```{r}
plot_error_by_n <- function(df, param, shape, col_palette,
                            abs_error = TRUE,
                            type = "boxplot",
                            axis_text_size = 14,
                            axis_title_size = 16,
                            legend_text_size = 12,
                            legend_title_size = 16,
                            title_size = 16,
                            hline_alpha = 0.5,
                            boxplot_width = 0.4,
                            add_horizontal_line = TRUE) {

  if (abs_error) {
    param_label <- switch(
      param,
      shape = expression("|" * hat(xi) - xi[0] * "|"),
      scale = expression("|" * hat(sigma) - sigma[0] * "|")
    )
  } else {
    param_label <- switch(
      param,
      shape = expression(hat(xi) - xi[0]),
      scale = expression(hat(sigma) - sigma[0])
    )
  }
  
  
  df_plot <- df %>%
    filter(parameter == param, true_shape == shape) %>%
    mutate(
      true_shape = factor(true_shape),
      n = factor(n),
      error = case_when(
        abs_error == TRUE ~  abs(estimate - true_value),
        abs_error == FALSE ~ estimate - true_value
      ))
  
  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = n, y = error, fill = method))
  
  if (type == "violin") {
    p <- p + 
      geom_violin(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
                  alpha = 0.7, 
                  scale = "width", 
                  trim = FALSE) +
      geom_boxplot(width = boxplot_width, 
                   position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                   outlier.size = 0.7, 
                   alpha = 0.5)
  } else {
    p <- p + 
      geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.7, 
                   position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
    
  }
  
  if (add_horizontal_line) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", 
                        alpha = hline_alpha)
  }
  
  p <- p + 
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = col_palette,
      labels = setNames(
        lapply(names(col_palette), function(m) {
          if (m == "LME") bquote(bold("LME" * "*")) else m
        }),
        names(col_palette)
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "n",
      y = param_label,
      title = bquote(xi[0] == .(shape)),
      fill = "Method"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      legend.text = element_text(size = legend_text_size),
      legend.title = element_text(size = legend_title_size),
      plot.title = element_text(size = title_size)
    )
  
  p
  
  return(p)
}

```

### Estimation errors by n

#### Shape

```{r error_shape_by_n, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
for (shape in shapes) {
  print(plot_error_by_n(gpdfitlist, param = "shape", shape = shape, 
                        col_palette = my_cols,
                        type = "boxplot", abs_error = FALSE))
}
```

#### Scale

```{r error_scale_by_n, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
for (shape in shapes) {
  print(plot_error_by_n(gpdfitlist, param = "scale", shape = shape, 
                        col_palette = my_cols,
                        type = "boxplot", abs_error = FALSE))
}
```


### Absolute estimation errors by n

#### Shape

```{r abs_error_shape_by_n, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
for (shape in shapes) {
  print(plot_error_by_n(gpdfitlist, param = "shape", shape = shape, 
                        type = "boxplot", abs_error = TRUE,
                        col_palette = my_cols,
                        add_horizontal_line = FALSE))
}
```

#### Scale

```{r abs_error_scale_by_n, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
for (shape in shapes) {
  print(plot_error_by_n(gpdfitlist, param = "scale", shape = shape, 
                        type = "boxplot", abs_error = TRUE,
                        col_palette = my_cols))
}
```

## Evaluation metrics

### Line plots

```{r}
plot_eval_metric_by_shape <- function(eval_df,
                                      shape_filter = NULL,
                                      col_palette,
                                      param = c("shape", "scale"),
                                      metric = c("bias", "rmse", "sd"),
                                      axis_text_size = 14,
                                      axis_title_size = 16,
                                      legend_text_size = 12,
                                      legend_title_size = 16,
                                      strip_text_size = 16,
                                      title_size = 18,
                                      hline_alpha = 0.5,
                                      boxplot_width = 0.4,
                                      ncol = 3) {
  
  # Parameter symbols
  param_expr <- if (param == "shape") quote(xi) else quote(sigma)

  # --- Define axis labels (formula only) and plot titles (metric name) ---
  metric_label <- switch(metric,
    "bias" = bquote(E[.(param_expr)](hat(.(param_expr))) - .(param_expr)[0]),
    "rmse" = bquote(sqrt(E[.(param_expr)]((hat(.(param_expr)) - .(param_expr)[0])^2))),
    "sd"   = bquote(sqrt(Var(hat(.(param_expr)))))
  )

  metric_title <- toupper(metric)  # e.g. "RMSE", "BIAS", "SD"

  df_plot <- eval_df %>%
    filter(parameter == param) %>%
    mutate(n = factor(n))
  
  if (!is.null(shape_filter)) {
    df_plot <- df_plot %>%
      filter(true_shape %in% shape_filter)
  }

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = n, y = .data[[metric]], color = method, group = method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", alpha = hline_alpha) +
    facet_wrap(~ true_shape, labeller = label_bquote(xi == .(true_shape)), ncol = ncol) +
    scale_color_manual(values = col_palette) +
    labs(
      x = "n",
      y = metric_label,
      color = "Method",
      title = metric_title
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      legend.text = element_text(size = legend_text_size),
      legend.title = element_text(size = legend_title_size),
      strip.text = element_text(size = strip_text_size),
      plot.title = element_text(size = title_size, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -45, hjust = 0)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

```

#### All shape values

```{r evaluation_metrics, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 10, dpi = 200}

for (metric in c("bias", "sd", "rmse")) {
  for (param in c("shape", "scale")) {
    print(plot_eval_metric_by_shape(evaluation, param = param, metric = metric,
                                    col_palette = my_cols))
  }
}
```

#### Selection of shape values

```{r evaluation_metrics_sel, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 4, dpi = 200}

for (metric in c("bias", "sd", "rmse")) {
  for (param in c("shape", "scale")) {
    print(plot_eval_metric_by_shape(evaluation, param = param, metric = metric,
                                    shape_filter = c(-0.4, 0, 0.4),
                                    ncol = 3, col_palette = my_cols))
  }
}
```

### Heatmaps

```{r}
plot_metric_heat <- function(evaluation,
                             metric = c("bias","sd","rmse"),
                             param  = c("shape","scale"),
                             digits = 3,
                             nrow = NULL,
                             ncol = NULL,
                             scale_mode = c("global", "row"),
                             scale_low = 0.4,
                             scale_mid = 0.7,
                             scale_high = 0.95,
                             outline_best = FALSE,
                             highlight_method = "LME",
                             title = NULL,
                             axis_text_size = 12,
                             axis_title_size = 16,
                             legend_text_size = 12,
                             legend_title_size = 13,
                             strip_text_size = 14,
                             title_size = 16) {

  metric     <- match.arg(metric)
  param      <- match.arg(param)
  scale_mode <- match.arg(scale_mode)
  
  df <- evaluation %>%
    filter(parameter == param) %>%
    select(true_shape, n, method, value = all_of(metric)) %>%
    mutate(n = factor(n),
           method = as.character(method))
  
  # "Best" score: |bias| for bias, raw values otherwise
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(score = if (metric == "bias") abs(value) else value) %>%
    group_by(true_shape, n) %>%
    mutate(
      row_min = min(score, na.rm = TRUE),
      row_max = max(score, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_best = !is.na(score) & (abs(score - row_min) <= .Machine$double.eps^0.5),
      lab     = sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), value)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

    # Axis math labels
  param_expr  <- if (param == "shape") quote(xi) else quote(sigma)
  metric_title <- toupper(metric)
  metric_label <- switch(metric,
    "bias" = bquote(E[hat(.(param_expr))] - .(param_expr)[0]),
    "rmse" = bquote(sqrt(E[(hat(.(param_expr)) - .(param_expr)[0])^2])),
    "sd"   = bquote(sqrt(Var(hat(.(param_expr)))))
  )
  
  # Fill mapping and legend according to scale_mode
  if (scale_mode == "row") {
    df <- df %>%
      group_by(true_shape, n) %>%
      mutate(
        scaled = ifelse(row_max > row_min, (score - row_min)/(row_max - row_min), 0)
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
    fill_aes   <- aes(fill = scaled)
    fill_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "yellow", high = "red",
                                      name = "Per-row scale\n(relative)")
  } else { # global
    if (metric == "bias") {
      # color by absolute bias
      df <- df %>% mutate(abs_value = abs(value))
      
      vmin <- 0
      vmax <- max(df$abs_value, na.rm = TRUE)
      q_low  <- quantile(df$abs_value, probs = scale_low, na.rm = TRUE)  # e.g., 0.15
      q_mid  <- quantile(df$abs_value, probs = scale_mid, na.rm = TRUE)  # e.g., 0.30
      q_high <- quantile(df$abs_value, probs = scale_high, na.rm = TRUE)  # e.g., 0.30
      
      fill_aes <- aes(fill = abs_value)
      fill_scale <- scale_fill_gradientn(
        colours = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red", "red3"),
        values  = scales::rescale(c(vmin, q_low, q_mid, q_high, vmax), 
                                   from = c(vmin, vmax)),
        limits  = c(vmin, vmax),
        name    = "|Bias|",
        guide   = guide_colourbar(
          frame.colour   = "black",
          frame.linewidth = 0.3,
          ticks.colour   = "black"
        )
      )
    } else {
      # SD / RMSE
      vmin <- min(df$value, na.rm = TRUE)
      vmax <- max(df$value, na.rm = TRUE)
      q_low  <- quantile(df$value, probs = scale_low, na.rm = TRUE)
      q_mid  <- quantile(df$value, probs = scale_mid, na.rm = TRUE)
      q_high <- quantile(df$value, probs = scale_high, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      fill_aes <- aes(fill = value)
      fill_scale <- scale_fill_gradientn(
        colours = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red", "red3"),
        values  = scales::rescale(c(vmin, q_low, q_mid, q_high, vmax), 
                                  from = c(vmin, vmax)),
        limits  = c(vmin, vmax),
        name    = metric_title,
        guide   = guide_colourbar(
          frame.colour   = "black",
          frame.linewidth = 0.3,
          ticks.colour   = "black"
        )
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Make one method bold
  method_labels <- setNames(
    lapply(levels(factor(df$method)), function(m) {
      if (m == highlight_method) bquote(bold(.(m) * "*")) else m
    }),
    levels(factor(df$method))
  )
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = method, y = n)) +
    geom_tile(fill_aes, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
    { if (outline_best) geom_tile(data = subset(df, is_best),
                                           color = "black", linewidth = 0.8, fill = NA) } +
    geom_text(aes(label = lab), size = 3) +
    fill_scale +
    facet_wrap(~ true_shape,
                         labeller = label_bquote(xi[0] == .(true_shape)),
                         ncol = ncol, nrow = nrow) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = method_labels) +
    labs(x = "Method", y = "n", #title = metric_title, subtitle = metric_label
         title = title) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = axis_text_size),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      legend.text = element_text(size = legend_text_size),
      legend.title = element_text(size = legend_title_size),
      strip.text = element_text(size = strip_text_size, face = "bold")
    )

  return(p)
}

```

#### All shapes

```{r heat_shape_bias, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
  plot_metric_heat(metric = "bias", param = "shape")
```
```{r heat_shape_sd, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
  plot_metric_heat(metric = "sd", param = "shape")
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200, eval=FALSE}
for (mid2 in seq(0.8, 0.9, 0.1)) {
  for (mid1 in seq(0.3, 0.5, 0.1)) {
    if (mid2 > mid1) {
      title = paste0("mid1=", mid1, ", mid2=", mid2)
      p <- evaluation %>% 
        filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
        plot_metric_heat(metric = "rmse", param = "shape",
                         scale_mode = "global", title = title,
                         scale_mid1 = mid1, scale_mid2 = mid2)
      print(p)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r heat_shape_rmse, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
plot_metric_heat(metric = "rmse", param = "shape")
```

```{r heat_scale_bias, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
plot_metric_heat(metric = "bias", param = "scale")
```
```{r heat_scale_sd, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
plot_metric_heat(metric = "sd", param = "scale")
```

```{r heat_scale_rmse, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi = 200}
evaluation %>% 
  filter(true_shape %in% c(-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6)) %>%
plot_metric_heat(metric = "rmse", param = "scale")
```

### Tables

```{r}
make_metric_heat_kable <- function(evaluation, 
                                   metric = c("bias","sd","rmse"),
                                   param  = c("shape","scale"),
                                   digits = 3,
                                   methods_order = c("LME","MLE1D","MLE2D",
                                                     "NLS2","WNLLSM","ZSE")) {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  param  <- match.arg(param)

  df <- evaluation %>%
    filter(parameter == param, method %in% methods_order) %>%
    select(true_shape, n, method, val = all_of(metric)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = val) %>%
    arrange(true_shape, n)

  method_cols <- intersect(methods_order, names(df))
  pal <- colorRampPalette(c("yellow", "red"))

  colorize_row <- function(v_num) {
    # Use distance to zero for bias; raw values otherwise
    score <- if (metric == "bias") abs(v_num) else v_num

    if (all(is.na(score))) return(rep(NA_character_, length(score)))
    vmin <- min(score, na.rm = TRUE)
    vmax <- max(score, na.rm = TRUE)
    scaled <- if (vmax > vmin) (score - vmin)/(vmax - vmin) else rep(0, length(score))
    cols <- pal(1001)[floor(scaled*1000) + 1]

    is_best <- !is.na(score) & (abs(score - vmin) <= .Machine$double.eps^0.5)
    out_lab <- sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), v_num)
    ifelse(is_best,
           kableExtra::cell_spec(out_lab, bold = TRUE, background = cols),
           kableExtra::cell_spec(out_lab, background = cols))
  }

  # apply row-wise
  mat_vals <- as.matrix(df[, method_cols])
  colored  <- t(apply(mat_vals, 1, function(r) colorize_row(as.numeric(r))))
  colnames(colored) <- method_cols

  df_print <- cbind("ξ₀" = df$true_shape, df["n"], 
                    as.data.frame(colored, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))

  kb <- kableExtra::kbl(df_print, escape = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE,
                        align = c("c", "c", rep("c", length(method_cols))),
                        caption = paste0(toupper(metric), 
                                         " across methods (parameter: ", param, ")"))

  # Group by shape with separators
  row_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(df)), df$true_shape)
  for (lab in names(row_idx)) {
    rng <- range(row_idx[[lab]])
    kb <- kableExtra::group_rows(kb, label = paste0("ξ₀ = ", lab),
                                 start = rng[1], end = rng[2], escape = FALSE)
  }
  kb %>% kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
}
```


```{r}
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "bias", param = "shape")
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "sd", param = "shape")
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "rmse", param = "shape")
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "bias", param = "scale")
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "sd", param = "scale")
make_metric_heat_kable(evaluation, metric = "rmse", param = "scale")
```


## Files written

These files have been written to the target directory, ```r paste0("data/", params$name)```:

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target())
```
